prestazioni: M Performance Power and Sound Kit for B58B30M0 (Stage 1.5) with upgraded turbo inlets, high-flow downpipe (VRSF 4" catted), and custom MHD Flash (93 octane + E50 mix) targeting 480whp/520wtq on stock turbo with optimized boost curve (22psi peak, 19psi cruise) and revised ignition timing (3° advance in mid-range)

Full bolt-on cooling system: CSF radiator (BMW PN: 37-11-8-615-800), 75° thermostat (Mishimoto MMTS-B58-17), and upgraded oil cooler (Setrab 13-row core) with AN-10 lines and Earl's fittings to prevent heat soak during track use

Suspension overhaul: KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (rebound/compression/height adjustable) with custom valving for the G01 chassis, paired with M Performance sway bars (24mm front, 21mm rear) and poly bushings (034 Motorsport subframe bushings) to eliminate torque steer under hard launches
estetica: Rocket Bunny G01-specific widebody kit (Pandem X3M40i) with carbon fiber fenders, extended rockers, and aggressive front splitter (30mm overhang) for improved aero balance (target -150kg downforce at 120mph)

Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system (dual 102mm tips) with integrated electronic bypass valves (coded to M40i exhaust note via BMW iDrive), paired with M Performance carbon fiber diffuser (BMW PN: 51-71-2-453-374)

OEM+ wheel setup: HRE FF01 (20x10.5 ET35 front, 20x11.5 ET40 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear) and custom spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the Rocket Bunny arches without rubbing
